REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-22-2019 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** ALISA KIM, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER AT TRIAL CALL. COUNSEL REQUESTED TO STRIKE DEFENDANT'S ANSWER AND THEREAFTER PLAINTIFF WOULD SUBMIT A REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. THE COURT DENIED THAT REQUEST, HOWEVER COUNSEL COULD PROCEED FORTHWITH TO DEPT. 514 FOR A DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING. COUNSEL INDICATED SHE WAS NOT PREPARED TO GO FORWARD WITH THE DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING AND THEREAFTER REQUESTED TO DISMISS THE CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT GRANTED THAT REQUEST AND DISMISSED THE CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
